args.subject: Client Meeting Minutes and Next Steps
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this email finds you well. I'm sending you a summary of our recent meeting on May 5, 2024.

During our discussion, we covered your requirements for the new project, agreed on the project timeline and key milestones, and reviewed the initial design concepts. Your feedback was very helpful and will guide our next steps.

As discussed, the next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024. We'll continue to make progress on the project in the meantime.

Please find the detailed meeting minutes attached for your reference.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
